= [[Events]] =
Icons for [[Events]]

= Event Icons =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Carnival Balloon}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mystery Ash}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Spirit Crystal}}
|}

= 2024 May - [[Golden Week]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Flip Card Ticket}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Happy Coin}}||Get better version that's not cut off
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Silver Hammer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Golden Hammer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Diamond Hammer}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Blooming Peony|purple}}||Shell
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ink Chrysanths|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Nuclear-Powered Mini Fan|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Space Water Bear, +280 Fragments|orange|Minion_Sim#Precious-Orange_Tactical_Logs}}||Orange Tactical Logs
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fire Ring|orange}}||[[Red Doe]] Decoration
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Balloon|purple}}||[[Red Doe]] Decoration
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Seal|blue}}||[[Red Doe]] Decoration
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Iron Cage|green}}||[[Red Doe]] Decoration
|}

= 2024 Aug - [[1st Anniversary]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Bird}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Birthday Party Pack}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Candle of Skill}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Celebration Ticket}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|EXP Cake}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Flower}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Snail Coin}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Thank-you Pack}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Anniversary Cake|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Family Photo|black|Home Decoration}}||Home Decoration
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Golden Snail|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Robot Guard|orange|Robots}}||Robot
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|We Are Family|green}}
|}

= 2024 Sept - [[Venture to the Stars]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Aluminum Alloy Plate}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Chip}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Circuit Board}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Detector}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gear}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Space Token}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Starlight Key}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Chang'e and Laurel|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Cupid|orange|Robots}}||Robot
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Gan Shi Star Chart|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Large Carrier Rocket|black|Home Decoration}}||Home Decoration
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Lunar Soil Specimen|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Planet Model|green}}||[[Advisor Zhuge]] Decoration
|}

= 2024 Oct - [[Pumpkin Lucky Night]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Candy Cane (Currency)}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pumpkin Coin}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pumpkin Key}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Halloween Choice Pack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Katrina Skeleton|purple}}||Shell
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Nutcracker Jack|orange|Rocket#Robots}}||Robot
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Turnip Lamp|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Vampire Bat|purple}}||Shell
|}

= 2024 Dec - [[Snowy Xmas]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Bronze Longhu Cup|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Xmas Wreath|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Candy Cane|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|New Year Photo|green}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Bank Logo|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Counter|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|ATM|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Savings Counter|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Xmas Elf|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Monkey King|orange}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Christmas Hat|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Christmas Ornaments|purple}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Hot Cocoa}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Artist's Palette|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Code Monkey's Keyboard|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gym Monkey's Backpack|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Peetah's LU Suitcase|orange}}
|}

[[Category:Altar]]
[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Lottery Machine]]
